title: LOOP-RUN.md frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter block of a .planning/loops/<UTC-timestamp>-<project_id>.md file produced by tasks:loop / tasks:bug-smash. See docs/loop-run-schema.md for the full contract.

run_id.description: Stable identifier minted by the orchestrator at run start; used to dedupe re-emissions.

project_id.description: wood-fired-bugs project id the loop drained.

orchestrator_session_id.description: Claude Code session id of the orchestrating session. Joins to agent_transactions_v.session_id.

total_tokens.description: Sum of input + cache_create + cache_read + output tokens across orchestrator and all subagents.

total_usd.description: Sum cost in USD across orchestrator and all subagents (cache-discounted).

subagents_dispatched.description: Count of distinct subagent sessions spawned during the run.

tasks_attempted.description: Tasks picked up during the run (PASS + FAIL + PARTIAL + NOT_VERIFIED).
